properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Here I am All my intentions All my obsessions I want to lay them all down In Your hands Only Your love is vital Though I'm not entitled Still You call me Your child

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God You don't need me But somehow You want me Oh, how You love me Somehow that frees me To take my hands off of my life And the way it should go

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: God You don't need me But somehow You want me Oh, how You love me Somehow that frees me To open my hands up And give You control I give You control

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I've had plans Shattered and broken Things I have hoped in Fall through my hands You have plans To redeem and restore me You're behind and before me Oh, help me believe

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: God You don't need me But somehow You want me Oh, how You love me Somehow that frees me To take my hands off of my life And the way it should go, oh

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: God You don't need me But somehow You want me Oh, how You love me Somehow that frees me To open my hands up And give You control

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Oh, You want me Somehow You want me The King of Heaven wants me So this world has lost it's grip on me

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Oh, You want me Somehow You want me The King of Heaven wants me So this world has lost it's grip on me

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: God You don't need me But somehow You want me Oh, how You love me Somehow that frees me To take my hands off of my life And the way it should go, oh

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: God You don't need me But somehow You want me Oh, how You love me Somehow that frees me To open my hands up And give You control I give You control

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Oh, give You control Oh, I want to give You control I give You control

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: You want me Somehow You want me The King of Heaven wants me So this world has lost it's grip on me.
